info.description: API for PlantPal - a plant care and health monitoring application.
info.title: PlantPal API

post.description: Upload a plant image to start a diagnosis chat session. Returns initial analysis and chat session.

get.description: Get full chat history for a diagnosis session

post.description: Send a message in an existing diagnosis session. Full chat history is sent to AI.
post.summary: Send a follow-up message in a diagnosis chat

post.description: Authenticate with email and password to receive access and refresh tokens

400.description: invalid request body or missing fields

post.description: Revoke a refresh token to invalidate a session

400.description: invalid request body or missing refresh_token

404.description: refresh token not found or already revoked

get.description: Get the notification preferences for the authenticated user

put.description: Update the notification preferences for the authenticated user

get.description: Get all plants belonging to the authenticated user

post.description: Manually create a new plant entry

get.description: Get a single plant with all related data

delete.description: Delete a plant and all its related data

get.description: Get all activities logged for a specific plant
get.summary: Get activity log for a plant

post.description: Log a care activity for a plant

get.description: Get the care plan associated with a plant
get.summary: Get care plan for a plant

put.description: Update the care plan for a plant

get.description: Get all growth records for a specific plant
get.summary: Get growth metrics for a plant

post.description: Record a new growth measurement for a plant

get.description: Get all reminders for a specific plant

post.description: Exchange a refresh token for a new access and refresh token pair (single-use rotation)

400.description: invalid request body or missing refresh_token

401.description: invalid, expired, or revoked refresh token

post.description: Create a new user account with full name, email, password, and phone number

400.description: invalid request body or validation error

409.description: email or phone number already exists

get.description: Get all due reminders for the authenticated user today

post.description: Upload a plant image for identification. Returns retake=true if confidence is low.

get.description: Get details of a specific scan

valid.description: Valid is true if Time is not NULL
